title: Mobile user has few headsets, some disconnected
scenario: Verify that the Lens tenant correctly displays active (green) and disconnected (red) status for multiple paired headsets across Inventory, device profile, and user profile pages.
steps: Pair 3 or more headsets with a mobile user's device.
Turn off or unpair at least one of the paired headsets.
Navigate to the Inventory page in the Lens tenant.
Observe the status indicators for each headset.
Navigate to the Inventory/device profile page.
Observe the status indicators for each headset.
Navigate to the Device Users/user profile page.
Observe the status indicators for each headset.
expected: Active headsets show as active with green marks, and disconnected headsets show as inactive with red marks on the Inventory page, Inventory/device profile page, and Device Users/user profile page.
